title: Mxstic
description: Our first modpack, now available on Modrinth, is designed for easy search and download via the Modrinth app. It includes the pre-populated MxsticCraft Server.
body:
# **Mxstic Modpack – 1.21.10 IS HERE AND IT’S A BEAST!**

The update just dropped on Modrinth — fresh, polished, and fully loaded for Minecraft 1.21.10.
We rebuilt this from the ground up, custom-tailored for MxsticMC. Out-of-the-box: next-level models, lighting that pops, and rock-solid performance that keeps RAM usage tiny. Want even more? Hit the Resource Packs or Shaders menu — the built-in downloader and browser lets you search, grab, and install any resource pack or shader pack in seconds, right from inside the game.

Mxstic servers are waiting in your multiplayer list. Update, launch, and jump straight in.
This is the cleanest, fastest, most flexible version we’ve ever shipped. Get it now — the world looks insane, and it’s calling your name.

See you inside. Let’s go!
